title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Canara Bank Capital India family as a Risk Analyst in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Canara Bank Capital India:
Canara Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
